feed.title: SAP Community - SAP BTP, ABAP environment
feed.subtitle: SAP BTP, ABAP environment Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Validations on 'Apply' in restful ABAP
entry.content:
Hello,

I have an application(draft enabled) developed using restful abap where I have a parent entity and child entity.
The child entity has few mandatory fields which I am validating using validations.
But the validations gets triggered when I save the BO.

I want the validations to be triggered when I go to the child entity and hit 'Apply' without entering the mandatory fields.

Please let me know if there is way I can achieve this.

entry.title: SQL Syntax error
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I am trying to create a AMDP class to get the current date as the output of the class. And i need to call this class in the BW transformations. Please find the sample code that i wrote.

 

CLASS Today_date DEFINITION
  PUBLIC
  FINAL
  CREATE PUBLIC .
  PUBLIC SECTION.

  INTERFACES if_amdp_marker_hdb.
  class-methods amdp_procedure
  exporting
  value(i_sydat) type dats.
  PROTECTED SECTION.
  PRIVATE SECTION.
ENDCLASS.

CLASS Today_date IMPLEMENTATION.
METHOD amdp_procedure by database procedure
                   for hdb
                   language sqlscript
                   options read-only.
                  
i_sydat = (cl_abap_context_info=>get_system_date( ));
ENDMETHOD.
ENDCLASS.

 

 I am getting the syntax error in Line number 21. The error is SQLSCRIPT: sql syntax error: incorrect syntax near "=>" . Could you please help on, how to correct this error. And also how to call this clss inside BW transformation ?

And in the transformation,

ZLOADING_DATE = CALL "TODAY_DATE=>AMDP_PROCEDURE(i_SYDAT)

Pls correct me, if i am wrong.

entry.title: PPE tcode
entry.content:
Hi, 

I want to update source code in PPE transaction. is there any bapi or function module to update?

Thnx in advance 🙂

entry.title: ECP connectivity with MBC (Mutli Bank Connectivity)
entry.content:
Hi Team - Has anyone worked with MBC before in HR Payroll landscape? If yes, what's the best practice recommendation around ECP connecting with MBC. I understand it's typical to connect S/4 HANA with MBC however, any recommendations around connecting ECP would be appreciated. 

Thanks,

entry.title: I am not able to find the entries for KZ documents type in FBL1N T code. Can you pls advise?
entry.content:
I am not able to find documents type KZ in FBL1N t code. As I am trying to extract data for few profit centers in our division.

Can you please advise how can I extract KZ documents?

 

Thanks

entry.title: Connect to ABAP environment using RFC
entry.content: Hello, I have created an ABAP environment on my SAP BTP Cloud trial account. The runtime environment is Cloud Foundry. Now I’m trying to connect to it with RFC connection, although I’m struggling finding the right host and port to connect. So far I tried to connect with username/password. I found some NAT IPs (egress, IPs for requests from an ABAP System) which I tried to connect to but none of them worked. Or is there an url to access the environment? Could anyone help me with this? Thanks.

entry.title: SAP Master Data Integration issue for Subscription Billing with SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello All,

We are using the Subscription Billing solution with SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud system.

When I try to utilize the function of test connection to make the replication is active from Sub Bill system to SAP S/4 we are encountering a 404 HTTP error and I'm attaching a screenshot below for the same.

If anyone has any expertise on how to fix this or come across same situation, please throw some lights.

SAP S/4HANA SAP Subscription Billing SAP BTP, ABAP environment SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Sales SAP Billing and Revenue Innovation Management, subscription order management 

Thanks!

entry.title: ABAP RAP - Service Binding is not getting refreshed automatically after change in CDS Entities
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

I am facing a strange issue where after making any change in my Fiori elements application changes are not reflecting automatically on the UI. I figured out that Service binding is not adapting the changes automatically further i tried to clean the cache but it didn't helped. Currently Only workaround is to delete the service binding and create a new one.

If anyone faced this issue in past please share your experience to handle this.

Thanks in advance

entry.title: How to configure SAP system in Eclipse ?
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts !

We have to configure SAP system (Dev 100) in eclipse, we have tried multiple times but unable to do it. The Next and Finish  button are disabled that's why we could not complete steps. Kindly refer below Screen-shot for your information. I hope we will get the best solution form your side, as this issue is pending from last 2 months.

Note : I have explored multiple blogs post one of them is, 
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/how-to-deploy-a-simple-sapui5-application-into-abap-server-using-eclipse/ba-p/13173902 , but unfortunately could not configure completely. 

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: How to navigate with multiple values of parameters in intent based navigation from UI component card
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

Can you please help us in navigation to standard fiori app ( list of incomplete sales orders) where we need to pass multiple sales order while navigating. 
We are using ui component card with intent based navigation. 
Any code to pass multiple values in parameters is appreciated

entry.title: Filter By Child Association Column values in LROP - BTP ABAP Envrionment
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Is there any alternative way in the BTP ABAP Environment to fitler data using Associated column values ?

I was trying to use virtual element with below annotation which gives an error as "@ObjectModel.filter.transformedBy is not permitted or released"

@ObjectModel.filter.transformedBy

I am able to use filter only for root node (list page) columns.

@Andre_Fischer - Please help me here,

Thanks a lot.

Best Regards,

Muthu

entry.title: FIS Invoice Approval Error in Fiori
entry.content:
Dear Team,

Could you please help on the below error, Many users are getting this error while approving Invoices from Fiori.

I am not able to find anything specific, This is a standard SAP

entry.title: FM or BAPI for VF03, FB03 attachment list download
entry.content:
Hello!

Which BAPIs or FM shall I use to download GOS attachments (VF03 transaction with billing document number, attachment list)? The attachments are downloaded via http (files are in a web server). Same for FB03 transaction (with supplier invoices).

I mean the “export” functionality that it’s within the attachment list tab. When doing manually (if I double click on attachment itself) my browser is opened and pdf file is shown. I have inspected this and an http request is made to some server, which returns the pdf itself. I have looked some FM such as BDS_GOS_CONNECTIONS_GET (which returns the metadata of the attachments, but cannot download the attachment with that one) and BDS_BUSINESSDOCUMENT_GET_TAB which does not help.

Thanks a lot

entry.title: Cannot access tiles on Launchpad & Mobile ( SAP Mobile Start )
entry.content:
Hi all,

Please advice, how to solving this?
I cannot accessing tiles on rule SAP_BR_PURCHASER.
But when click tiles, always loading never ending and until timeout.

 

Regards,

entry.title: Trigger Adobe form and Smartform logo based on Output type for Billing Document
entry.content:
Hi, I have a case where there are 4 output types for one Billing Document. They are : YRD3, YRD4, ZRD0 and ZRD3. YRD3 is a copy of ZRD3 here. ZRD3 is printing 'ABC' logo and YRD3 is also printing same 'ABC' logo. When I change the conditions for the smartform for these output types, both ZRD3 and YRD3 printing the changed 'XYZ' logo.

What I want to achieve here is, I want 'ABC' logo (old one) for ZRD3 and 'XYZ' logo (new one) for YRD3.

How can I achieve this change ? Help Appreciated. Thanks!

entry.title: Connect BTP ABAP Environment to GitLab On-Premise
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have an On-Premise version of GitLab which is now used to maintain the UI codebase. However, with the ABAP environment in BTP it seems that using the ABAPGIT is the only way to manage and move codes in the cloud environment. Since we already have an on-premise version of GitLab, we would like to use the same for ABAP as well. But unfortunately we are not able to connect the GitLab On-Premise instance to the BTP ABAP environment. 

It would be great if someone from the community can support us or guide us from similar experiences from the past.

entry.title: Query related learning hub course:'Acquiring Core ABAP Skills'
entry.content:
Unable to find class 'lrn/cl_s4d400_btt_debug' in Eclipse, mentioned in learning hub for 'Acquiring Core ABAP Skills'. 

 

Follow the same, but no result found. I am using trial version

Thanks in Advance

entry.title: Adobe Forms - Terms & Conditions Printing
entry.content:
This is an order confirmation form in which client has shared PDF file to be printed at last as terms and conditions(T&C). This PDF is of 10 pages which includes some tables, logo too.

Challenge which we are facing here is saving these files at one place and from there printing in adobe form layout. Currently we are stuck with main part i.e., uploading to some location(E.g. AL11) and fetching and printing on form.

Can someone please suggest if anybody has achieved similar requirement or any suggestions on possible ways to achieve this.

entry.title: ABAP CDS Hierarchy Definition - Not able to Preview
entry.content:
Hello Team,

I was unable to preview the data for the Hierarchy Definition CDS view. It says there was some authorization checks failure. I want to apply Hierarchy aggregate functions on this CDS view but it fails to return the data.

Please note that this issue is occurring in both trail and productive versions. Please let me know how to resolve this error.

Edit: When I took Authorization traces, it clearly says Authorization S_TABU_NAM Read & Write is getting failed. But How do I resolve this authorization issue ?

Thanks a lot.

Best Regards,

Muthu

entry.title: Is extensibility possible to upload more than 999 line items by using Upload Customer Open Items app
entry.content:
Our client has embarked journey of business transformation into S/4 HANA Public Cloud system. So the client has preselected scope item – J59 (Accounts Receivables) to upload customer open items (AR items) by using standard App - Upload Customer Open Item

Here the business team would be planning to use this app to upload customer open items on monthly basis hence they are intended to upload more than 2000 entries in single file.

Project Phase:- Explore

Issue Description: -

While testing the app - Upload Customer Open Item in starter system, the app is giving error message  if the upload file contains more than 2000 records

As per SAP help document , it is mentioned that each time you can upload no more than 2,000 entries in a file. If we have more than 2,000 entries in a file, split them up and upload them separately. As the maximum number of entries in an invoice during posting is limited to 999, avoid entering more entries than that number.

In current SAP ECC system of client, there is custom transaction code created which splits the file logically if items are more than 999 items. Hence the business team does not require it splits the file manually. so the business team is looking forward for similar solution where the app can able to split the files if entries more than 2000 (999 items) as it will require hugh manual efforts from business side to split the records into multiple files.

Regards,

Ajit
